top_signals.title: Canada sends trade mission to Japan in diversification effort
top_signals.summary: Canada is looking to increase trade with Japan by leveraging its abundant natural resources, as well as its strengths in artificial intelligence and agricultural products.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: International workshop on Fukushima nuclear accident held in Futaba
top_signals.summary: A total of about 140 nuclear regulatory officials and experts, including those from the United States and France, took part in the workshop.
